title: 201 Demos
description: Advanced demos covering deeper Devin workflows and complex scenarios.

contentGroups.title: From Rough Ideas to Executable Tickets (Linear) with Devin
contentGroups.description: In this demo, we explore how to bridge the gap between product ideation and engineering execution using Devin. Starting with a broad goal to add research history and context-aware follow-ups to a multi-agent tool. This demo showcases how Devin can transform loose concepts into a highly structured Product Requirements Document (PRD) and generate Linear tickets for each task.
